texto: It may well be on such a night of clouds and cruel colors that there is brought forth upon the earth such a portent as a respectable poet. You say you are a poet of law
autor: I say you are a contradiction in terms. I only wonder there were not comets and earthquakes on the night you appeared in this garden.
explicacao: Citação de I say you are a contradiction in terms. I only wonder there were not comets and earthquakes on the night you appeared in this garden. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It may well be on such a night of clouds and cruel colors that there is brought forth upon the ea…” articula reflexao, g-k-chesterton, the-man-who-was-thursday-a-nightmare em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
